AI Harness
AI Sense
All Patterns
Depth: Very Deep Model role: Autonomous reasoning and acting engine

Agent and Automation

Adds tools, planning, state management, and multi step loops for autonomous task execution

Real World Analogy

Like hiring a general contractor instead of asking for renovation advice. The contractor does not just tell you what to do. They make a plan, hire subcontractors, buy materials, check results, adjust when things go wrong, and keep going until the job is done.

How It Works

Agent harnesses give AI the ability to take actions in the real world, not just generate text. The AI can use tools, make plans, execute multi step workflows, and adjust its approach based on results. Think of it as the difference between asking someone for directions versus hiring someone to drive you there.

The wrapping around the AI is the deepest of any harness type. It includes planning engines that break big tasks into steps, tool calling systems that let the AI interact with software and websites, state management that tracks progress across long running tasks, and safety guardrails that prevent the AI from taking harmful actions.

The same AI model can perform dramatically differently depending on its harness. In benchmarks, one model scored 78% with one harness and only 42% with another, a 36 point gap from the wrapping alone.

Components

  • Tool calling with structured schemas for interacting with external systems
  • Planning loops that break tasks into steps and adapt based on results
  • State persistence and checkpointing for long running tasks
  • Multi agent coordination with handoffs between specialized agents
  • Human in the loop approval workflows for sensitive actions
  • Observability and tracing for monitoring agent behavior

Real World Examples

Claude Agent SDK

Gives AI a body with computer, terminal, and filesystem access

LangGraph

Graph based state machine for building agents with conditional branching, 47M+ downloads

Zapier Agents

AI agents with access to 7,000+ app integrations that make decisions

Anthropic Computer Use

AI that controls a desktop computer through screenshots, clicks, and typing

Key Terms

Tool calling

The ability for AI to invoke external functions like searching the web, running code, or sending messages.

Agent loop

The cycle where AI thinks, acts, observes results, and decides the next step, repeating until done.

Human in the loop

A design pattern where AI pauses at critical decision points and asks a human for approval.

Related Patterns

  • Code and Developer
  • Safety and Guardrail
  • Conversational
RAG and Knowledge Safety and Guardrail
AI Harness v1.0 · March 2026
